sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value Date32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (1, toDate32('2023-03-15'));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = toDate32('2025-12-31') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toDate32('1990-01-01') AS converted_date, toTypeName(converted_date) FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_value FROM test_dates WHERE date_value > toDate32('2000-01-01');
